positive: A highly detailed, symmetrical, and balanced composition featuring stylized celestial botanical elements. Imagine interconnected roots and glowing celestial flora growing around a central, stylized crescent moon. The overall aesthetic should be neo-tattoo or ethereal line art style, using strong, crisp silhouettes and negative space for contrast. Incorporate elements like constellations, delicate vine patterns, and phosphorescent bioluminescent lily pads. Limited color palette: deep indigo, dusty gold, emerald green, and pure white ink contrast. The design must be perfectly centered and scalable, looking immaculate as a single-color screen print on apparel. Vector graphic quality, intricate patterns, mystical, tranquil.
negative: text, words, lettering, logo, trademark, watermark, blur, noisy, grainy, artifact, bad anatomy, extra limbs, out of frame, photographic, 3D render, sketch, pencil drawing
